rationale: Job-postings corpus has zero points for high-growth-public 'Entry/Associate' (our L3) — all 13 Mid-level and 12 Senior/Staff points skew to L4/L5. No entry-level TAM/Customer Solutions Engineer postings with disclosed comp found via search either. Current base p50 $109K is a reasonable step down from the corpus-grounded L4 figure but unverified directly.
